title: Nursery Rhyme. DCLVIII. Relics.
content:
St. Thomas's-day is past and gone,
            And Christmas is a-most a-come,
                    Maidens arise,
                    And make your pies,
            And save poor tailor Bobby some.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. DCLVIII. Relics."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
